import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # --- Previous state ---
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # --- Next state ---
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    hs = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    hn = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Success ---
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    success_n = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    success_s = pyr_on_grid_s & (~holding_s) & (dist_pyr_sq_s >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_s <= 1.5)

    # Large success reward
    r_success = success_n.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # --- Potential function ---
    # We define a potential that measures how close we are to the goal.
    # Phase 0 (not holding): potential = -dist(agent, pyramid)
    # Phase 1 (holding): potential = C - dist(agent, square)  [C large enough to exceed phase 0]
    # Phase 2 (placed adjacent): potential = very high

    # Distance agent to pyramid
    dist_ap_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_ap_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)

    # Distance agent to square
    dist_as_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_as_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)

    # Potential for state s
    # Phase 0: not holding, pyramid on grid → -dist(agent, pyramid)
    # Phase 1: holding → big offset - dist(agent, square)
    # Phase 2: placed adjacent → very big value

    max_d = jnp.float32(H + W)
    phase_offset = max_d * 2.0  # ensures holding phase > not-holding phase

    # Potential when not holding and pyramid on grid
    pot_phase0_s = -dist_ap_s
    pot_phase1_s = phase_offset - dist_as_s
    pot_phase2_s = phase_offset * 2.0  # placed adjacent

    pot_s = jnp.where(
        success_s,
        pot_phase2_s,
        jnp.where(holding_s, pot_phase1_s, pot_phase0_s)
    )

    pot_phase0_n = -dist_ap_n
    pot_phase1_n = phase_offset - dist_as_n
    pot_phase2_n = phase_offset * 2.0

    pot_n = jnp.where(
        success_n,
        pot_phase2_n,
        jnp.where(holding_n, pot_phase1_n, pot_phase0_n)
    )

    # Potential-based shaping reward
    gamma = 0.99
    r_shaping = (gamma * pot_n - pot_s) * 0.1

    # --- Milestone bonuses ---
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # Bonus for placing adjacent
    placed_adj = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    placed_near = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 2.5)
    placed_far = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 2.5)

    r_putdown = (
        placed_adj.astype(jnp.float32) * 8.0
        + placed_near.astype(jnp.float32) * 0.5
        + placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-0.5)
    )

    # Small time penalty to encourage efficiency
    r_time = jnp.float32(-0.01)

    total = r_shaping + r_pickup + r_putdown + r_success + r_time

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
